title: stelis coarctata
intro: Stelis coarctata, also known as the Coarctata Stelis, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis coarctata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antifungal properties, making it a valuable herb in the treatment of various health conditions. The herb is traditionally prepared as a tea or tincture, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
